headline: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: LOWELL, Ark., July 22, 2026--J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ:JBHT) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly dividend on its common stock of $ 0.45 (forty five cents) per common share. The dividend is payable to stockholders of record on August 7, 2026 and will be paid on August 21, 2026.
